title: Tinted Lamps
body:
![header](https://i.imgur.com/kLjHmfn.jpg)
Looking for EXTRA Glowstone Related Content?

Well your search is over!

![header](https://i.imgur.com/A2ZQn1I.jpg)

Tinted Lamps Brings A fresh take on the whole Decorative Lamp using glowstones by adding in a wide variety of colors to the mix.

We Also Have an interesting looking ore which can be found by breaking the naturally generated glowstone found in the nether. Since its an ore, we do what we do best when we find new ores......
![Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0db56df0d2ea4a4ab944ca1b77bc3bd7a3a4ac74.png)


We dump it into a furnace to produce......... You guessed it. INGOTS!!!!!
![smelting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e9705cb25dda6b57b6d3c4706499155e646cba0.png)


Now what do we do with these new ingots.....hmm... Oh I know!  Let's try putting them in a stonecutter and see what we get......

![Glowstone dust via Stone Cutter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e5764aa0bfa0f87c788c7f18af09600d5b6edb1.png)

Oh? We can get Glowstone dust this way...Cool!

Glowstone Dust can Also be dyed in order to craft various colored glowstone blocks which can be used to make Lamps!

![dyed dust](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37cc302b1985718cc5faa45f25dd5ff28544167d_0.webp)

Pretty Awesome Looking Lamp right?

![lamp off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7e3eccfc074dc63652d1e31609022f61d8d5756.png)

![lamp on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0637acc71837150469b080585c0d00e0237cb865.png)

All of The Other Recipes can be found using JEI!



Please Enjoy This Mod.



You are Free To add this mod to your modpacks!
